title: Short Human-Readable Title
description: One to two sentence description of what this prompt does and when to use it.
prompt:
Your prompt body here. Use {{VARIABLE_NAME}} for any values the user needs to replace.

Example:
I am building {{PROJECT_DESCRIPTION}}. Help me {{TASK}}.

Constraints:
- {{CONSTRAINT_1}}
- No external libraries.

variables.name: VARIABLE_NAME
variables.description: Describe what the user should put here

exampleOutput: Optional: paste a sample of good AI output here to set expectations
author: your-github-username
